refs.summary: New daemon/shared runtime policy lease snapshot: effective permission mode, base policy lease, approval grant/allow-once lease, pending gate, and sandbox posture.
Exports the policy_lease module to shared runtime consumers.
Preserves auto-review/default/full-access policy provenance, reloads effective runtime policy, and emits policy_leases from inspect_thread.
Existing action boundary enforces approval grant and workspace filesystem boundary before effects.
Existing workspace boundary and policy augmentation logic covered by focused tests.
